description: Complete coordinate-level cells from the 15 official TAT-QA test-gold source tables selected for finance tool-routing evaluation. This is a narrow adaptation, not a reproduction of the full TAT-QA benchmark.

provenance.citation: Fengbin Zhu, Wenqiang Lei, Youcheng Huang, Chao Wang, Shuo Zhang, Jiancheng Lv, Fuli Feng, and Tat-Seng Chua. 2021. TAT-QA: A Question Answering Benchmark on a Hybrid of Tabular and Textual Content in Finance. ACL-IJCNLP 2021, pages 3277-3287. https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2021.acl-long.254
provenance.adaptation: All cells in each selected source table are retained with their zero-based row and column coordinates and exact raw strings. row_label is the trimmed text of the first cell in the source row. column_label joins trimmed non-empty header cells in that source column. numeric_value removes currency symbols, grouping commas, percent signs, ordinal suffixes, and numeric footnote markers; parenthesized values are negative, and displayed em/en dashes or hyphens are normalized to zero. Percentages remain in displayed percentage-point units rather than being divided by 100.
